key_claims: Race winning effort consists of 10 seconds full gas, 1 minute zone 5, then 4 minutes zone 4
Race winning efforts were identified by analyzing thousands of race files to find common trends among race winners
The protocol mimics a breakaway: establish separation with aggressive acceleration, then settle into a sustainable effort
Performing 4 repetitions of race winning intervals in a single session provides training benefit
The reticular activation system filters daily messages and helps achieve goals by pointing out helpful information
cluster_reasoning: Episode focuses on interval training methodology, structured protocol design based on race file analysis, and training metrics—core coaching content about what works and why.
